name: list_deploys
description: List deploys matching the provided filters. If no filters are provided, all deploys for the service are returned.

cursor.description: A unique string that corresponds to a position in the result list. If provided, the endpoint returns results that appear after the corresponding position. To fetch the first page of results, set to the empty string.

limit.description: The maximum number of deploys to return in a single page. To fetch additional pages of results, set the cursor to the last deploy in the previous page. It should be rare to need to set this value greater than 20.

serviceId.description: The ID of the service to get deployments for
